general.description: Configure bar widget appearance and refresh behavior

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Adjust the icon used by the bar widget.

behavior.title: Behavior
behavior.description: Choose which provider is shown and how often CodexBar refreshes.

showOnHover.label: Show on hover
showOnHover.desc: When enabled, the bar widget only shows the icon until you hover it.

barIcon.label: Bar Icon
barIcon.desc: Choose the icon shown in the bar widget

iconTextSpacing.label: Icon/Text Spacing
iconTextSpacing.desc: Space between the icon and the percentage text in the bar widget

textFields.title: Text Content
textFields.description: Choose which values appear in the bar text, set their order, and control separator formatting. Status requires `codexbar --status`.

separator.label: Separator
separator.desc: Text inserted between each selected field

separatorSpacing.label: Separator Spacing
separatorSpacing.desc: Spaces added on each side of the separator

text.title: Text
text.description: Customize the bar widget text style

useIconColor.label: Use Icon Color
useIconColor.desc: When enabled, the text color follows the icon color.

opacity.label: Text Opacity
opacity.desc: Opacity applied to the widget text.

pointSize.label: Text Size
pointSize.desc: Point size for the bar widget text (0 = theme default)

fontFamily.label: Font Family
fontFamily.desc: Optional font family (leave empty for theme default)

fontWeight.label: Font Weight
fontWeight.desc: Weight of the bar widget text

refreshInterval.label: Refresh Interval
refreshInterval.desc: Choose how often CodexBar refreshes data.

defaultProvider.label: Default Provider
defaultProvider.desc: Provider shown in the bar widget

notifyOnReset.label: Notify on Reset
notifyOnReset.desc: Show a notification when usage resets

notifyOnLowUsage.label: Notify on Low Usage
notifyOnLowUsage.desc: Alert when remaining usage is critically low

lowUsageThreshold.label: Low Usage Threshold (%)
lowUsageThreshold.desc: Percentage remaining to trigger the low-usage alert

config.title: CodexBar Configuration
config.securityNote: This file contains provider secrets and replaces Keychain storage. Keep it private.
config.reference: Location: ~/.codexbar/config.json. CodexBar creates the directory if needed and keeps permissions restricted on supported platforms.
config.providerAlreadyExists: Provider already exists in the config
config.schemaSummary: Root object should include `version` and a `providers` array. Provider order controls CLI and app display order.
config.quickEditorSummary: Use these controls to update the most common provider fields without hand-editing the JSON block below.
config.loadFallback: Config file missing or unreadable. Starting from an empty object.
config.mustBeObject: Config JSON must be an object
config.pathUnavailable: Home directory is unavailable, so the config path cannot be resolved
config.providersRequired: Root config must include a `providers` array
config.providerObject: Provider at index {index} must be an object
config.providerIdRequired: Provider at index {index} must define a non-empty `id`
config.providerEnabledBoolean: `enabled` must be a boolean for provider {id}
config.providerApiKeyString: `apiKey` must be a string or null for provider {id}
config.providerCookieHeaderString: `cookieHeader` must be a string or null for provider {id}
config.providerRegionString: `region` must be a string or null for provider {id}
config.providerWorkspaceString: `workspaceID` must be a string or null for provider {id}
config.tokenAccountsObject: `tokenAccounts` must be an object or null for provider {id}
config.tokenAccountsVersion: `tokenAccounts.version` must be a number for provider {id}
config.tokenAccountsActiveIndex: `tokenAccounts.activeIndex` must be a number for provider {id}
config.tokenAccountsAccounts: `tokenAccounts.accounts` must be an array for provider {id}
config.providerMissing: Selected provider was not present in the config

errors.cliMissingBody: Install codexbar and make sure it's available on your PATH. See Settings → Config for docs.
errors.cliMissing: CodexBar CLI not found (install codexbar and ensure it's on your PATH).
